data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Cisco IOS router.
data_description.password: The password used to log in to the router over SSH. Leave empty if no password is required.
data_description.port: The SSH port of the router. Leave empty to use the default.
data_description.username: The username used to log in to the router over SSH.

yaml_import_cannot_connect.description:
The YAML configuration for Cisco IOS at `{host}` could not be imported because the connection failed.

Please check that `{host}` is reachable, update your `configuration.yaml` if needed, and restart Home Assistant.
yaml_import_cannot_connect.title: YAML configuration import failed: cannot connect

data_description.consider_home: The number of seconds to wait before marking a device as away after it was last seen in the ARP table of the router.
